title: Metals Gain As Tightness In Physical Markets Comes Into Focus
section_path: Metals Gain As Tightness In Physical Markets Comes Into Focus
section_path_text: Metals Gain As Tightness In Physical Markets Comes Into Focus
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets shrugged off a stronger USD and hawkish central bankers to focus on tightness in physical markets. Falling inventories and strong premiums helped boost sentiment. Copper led the base metals sector higher amid signs of physical tightness despite the global economic headwinds.
